MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Thomas Mark Difranco, Esq., for failure to obtain Judgment following granting of Judgment on the Pleadings is ordered off calendar/Judgment on file. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

Motion For Enforcement Of Terms Of Settlement Pursuant To Ccp Section 664.6
Off Calendar Aug-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Enforcement of Settlement pursuant to CCP Section 664.6.

Appearances:
THOMAS MARK DEFRANCO, Esq., Kopp & Di Franco, (415) 981-0245, on behalf of plaintiff William L. Mills and moving party.
SHARON L. TATUM, (408) 263-1295, defendant in pro per and joining party.
GREGORY MILLS, 2618 San Jose Ave., S.F., CA. 94112, (415) 584-4364, defendant in pro per and opposing party.

The Court found that De Franco's Declaration was heresay, and Tatum declaration was not made under penalty of perjury, and non-compliance with CRC 201. The Court denied plaintiff's motion for enforcement of terms of settlement pursuant to CCP Section 664.6 without prejudice. JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: J. BRYCE, #3321 (504)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
